en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: ACCORDING TO JEDUTHUN. A PSALM OF ASAPH. I cry aloud to God, aloud to God, and he will hear me.
zh: 我要向 神發聲呼求， 我向 神發聲，他必留心聽我。

en: In the day of my trouble I seek the Lord; in the night my hand is stretched out without wearying; my soul refuses to be comforted.
zh: 我在患難的日子尋求主， 我整夜舉手禱告，總不倦怠， 我的心不肯受安慰。

en: When I remember God, I moan; when I meditate, my spirit faints. Selah
zh: 我想到 神，就哀怨唉哼； 我沉思默想，心靈就煩亂。

en: You hold my eyelids open; I am so troubled that I cannot speak.
zh: 你使我不能合眼， 我煩躁不安，連話也說不出來。

en: I consider the days of old, the years long ago.
zh: 我回想過往的日子， 上古的年代；

en: I said, "Let me remember my song in the night; let me meditate in my heart." Then my spirit made a diligent search:
zh: 我想起我夜間的詩歌。 我的心沉思默想，我的靈仔細探究。

en: "Will the Lord spurn forever, and never again be favorable?
zh: 主要永遠丟棄我， 不再施恩嗎？

en: Has his steadfast love forever ceased? Are his promises at an end for all time?
zh: 他的慈愛永遠消失， 他的應許永久廢去嗎？

en: Has God forgotten to be gracious? Has he in anger shut up his compassion?" Selah
zh: 神忘記施恩， 因忿怒而止住他的憐憫嗎？

en: Then I said, "I will appeal to this, to the years of the right hand of the Most High."
zh: 因此我說：“這是我的憂傷： 至高者的右手已經改變了 ！”

en: I will remember the deeds of the LORD; yes, I will remember your wonders of old.
zh: 我要述說耶和華的作為， 我要記念你古時所行的奇事。

en: I will ponder all your work, and meditate on your mighty deeds.
zh: 我要默想你一切所行的， 思想你的作為。

en: Your way, O God, is holy. What god is great like our God?
zh: 神啊！你的道路是聖潔的， 有哪一位神好像我們的 神這樣偉大呢？

en: You are the God who works wonders; you have made known your might among the peoples.
zh: 你是行奇事的 神， 你在萬民中顯明你的能力。

en: You with your arm redeemed your people, the children of Jacob and Joseph. Selah
zh: 你曾用你的膀臂救贖你的子民， 就是雅各和約瑟的子孫。

en: When the waters saw you, O God, when the waters saw you, they were afraid; indeed, the deep trembled.
zh: 神啊！眾水看見你， 眾水看見你就懼怕， 深淵也都戰抖。

en: The clouds poured out water; the skies gave forth thunder; your arrows flashed on every side.
zh: 密雲傾降雨水， 天空發出響聲， 你的箭閃射四方。

en: The crash of your thunder was in the whirlwind; your lightnings lighted up the world; the earth trembled and shook.
zh: 你的雷聲在旋風中響起來， 閃電照亮了世界， 大地戰抖震動。

en: Your way was through the sea, your path through the great waters; yet your footprints were unseen.
zh: 你的道路經過海洋， 你的路徑穿過大水， 但你的腳蹤無人知道。

en: You led your people like a flock by the hand of Moses and Aaron.
zh: 你曾藉著摩西和亞倫的手， 帶領你的子民如同帶領羊群一樣。
